name: XAUUSD_M5_AsiaLondonBreakout_v1
hypothesis: On XAUUSD M5, the Asia-session range (00:00-06:00 UTC) acts as accumulation; a London-session break (07:00-10:00 UTC) of that range with ATR-normalized displacement continues directionally for at least 1.5R before mean-reverting.

entry_rules.long: Price closes >= AsiaHigh + 0.5*ATR(14) within first 9 bars of London window AND breakout candle body >= 1.2*ATR(14)
entry_rules.short: Price closes <= AsiaLow - 0.5*ATR(14) within first 9 bars of London window AND breakout candle body >= 1.2*ATR(14)

notes: Inspired by LVC EA scout card (inspiration only).
